content: Explore codebase to find ALL locations where balance is displayed

Fix React Hook ESLint warnings (exhaustive-deps) - 9 total warnings
Test frontend compilation (yarn build) for errors
Call testing agent with NEW test users only (never real clients)
Review test report and fix any issues found
